subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth from the heaven of the Will of the All-Merciful unto the peoples of all worlds, that they may detach themselves from whatsoever they possess [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق من سماء مشیه الرحمن علی اهل الاکوان لینقطعهم عما عندهم و
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @empty learning; false spirituality, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
